entry.name: autoLayoutOnDesktopChange
entry.label: Automatically retile after switching virtual desktop

entry.name: autoLayoutOnNewWindow
entry.label: Automatically retile when new window appears on current desktop

entry.name: autoLayoutOnWindowClose
entry.label: Automatically retile after closing a window on current desktop

entry.name: autoLayoutOnWindowMinimize
entry.label: Automatically retile after minimizing a window on current desktop

entry.name: autoLayoutOnWindowRestore
entry.label: Automatically retile when restoring a minimized window

entry.name: tileOnStart
entry.label: Tile all windows on script start / login

entry.name: ignoreWordsTiling1
entry.label: Words to ignore from tiling (comma separated) – set 1

entry.name: ignoreWordsTiling2
entry.label: Words to ignore from tiling (comma separated) – set 2

entry.name: ignoreWordsCycling1
entry.label: Words to ignore from cycling (Ctrl+Esc) (comma separated) – set 1

entry.name: ignoreWordsCycling2
entry.label: Words to ignore from cycling (Ctrl+Esc) (comma separated) – set 2

entry.name: defaultPresetIndex
entry.label: Default ratio preset for new desktops/screens (0=1.5:1.5, 1=2.0:2.0, 2=3.0:3.0, 3=1.0:1.0)

entry.name: reorderSlotThreshold
entry.label: Minimum overlap ratio to accept drag-reorder (0.0–1.0)
